articles.headline: Is Weston McKennie USMNT's most important player?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew debate who is USMNT's most important player going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Is Weston McKennie USMNT's most important player?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew debate who is USMNT's most important player going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Does Christian Pulisic need to improve his form before the World Cup?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss Christian Pulisic's form leading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Does Christian Pulisic need to improve his form before the World Cup?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss Christian Pulisic's form leading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Do USMNT have a problem vs. European teams?

articles.headline: Marcotti: Pochettino should want answers about Crocker's resignation
articles.description: Gab Marcotti speaks about Matt Crocker's decision to quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation.

images.name: Marcotti: Pochettino should want answers about Crocker's resignation
images.caption: Gab Marcotti speaks about Matt Crocker's decision to quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation.

articles.headline: Why Weah & McKennie could be 'casualties' in Pochettino's system
articles.description: Herc Gomez discusses why he thinks Timothy Weah and Weston McKennie could be left out USMNT new system under Mauricio Pochettino.

images.name: Why Weah & McKennie could be 'casualties' in Pochettino's system
images.caption: Herc Gomez discusses why he thinks Timothy Weah and Weston McKennie could be left out USMNT new system under Mauricio Pochettino.

articles.headline: How USMNT, USWNT choose opponents, venues and prices for games
articles.description: USMNT and USWNT fans often complain about high ticket prices, repetitive cities and weak opponents for games, but U.S. Soccer explains everything that goes into such decisions.

images.name: USWNT walks the field at SoFi Stadium April5-2025 [1296x729]
images.credit: Brad Smith/ISI Photos/Getty Images for USSF

images.name: Who should be the starting striker for the USMNT?
images.caption: Herc Gomez and Shaka Hislop discuss the USMNT attacking options as Agyemang, Balogun and Wright all battle to start.

keyEvents.text: Malique Roberts (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, St. Kitts And Nevis 0, Cayman Islands 0.
Second Half begins St. Kitts And Nevis 0, Cayman Islands 0.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Wesley Robinson replaces Elijah Seymour.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Nequan Browne replaces Kyle Kelly.
Goal! St. Kitts And Nevis 0, Cayman Islands 1. Zachary Scott (Cayman Islands) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Wesley Robinson.
Raheem Hanley (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Julani Archibald (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Dionis Stephens replaces Yohannes Mitchum.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Shevene Boston replaces G'Vaune Amory.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Kalonji Clarke replaces Tyquan Terrell.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Joshwa Campbell replaces Matthew Suberan.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Trey Ebanks replaces Jacobbi Tugman.
Jordan Bonilla (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Tiquanny Williams (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card.
Nequan Browne (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card.
Mason Duval (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card.
Jahlyan Burt (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card.
Own Goal by Joshwa Campbell, Cayman Islands. St. Kitts And Nevis 1, Cayman Islands 1.
Jacobbi Tugman (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card.
Second yellow card to Jahlyan Burt (St. Kitts And Nevis).
Second Half ends, St. Kitts And Nevis 1, Cayman Islands 1.
